title: Silicaware
description: Silicone-based laboratory accessories including tubing, heating mantles, and desiccation equipment for flexible and durable applications.

subcategories.name: Silicone Tubing & Connectors
subcategories.description: Flexible, autoclavable silicone tubing and connectors for fluid transfer, peristaltic pumps, and vacuum line assemblies.

subcategories.name: Silicone Stoppers & Seals
subcategories.description: Chemical-resistant silicone closures for flasks and vessels, rated for temperatures from -60°C to +200°C.

subcategories.name: Heating Mantles & Accessories
subcategories.description: Silicone-insulated heating equipment providing uniform thermal distribution for round-bottom flasks and reaction vessels.

subcategories.name: Desiccators & Drying Equipment
subcategories.description: Moisture-controlled storage cabinets and vacuum desiccators with silicone seals for hygroscopic sample preservation.
